installCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @dripl/common build && pnpm --filter @dripl/utils build && pnpm --filter @dripl/db build && npx esbuild apps/ws-server/api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=apps/ws-server/api/index.js --external:@prisma/client --external:@prisma/adapter-pg --external:prisma --external:pg
